title: Beavers Make a Splash in London
story: Guess who's back in town? Beavers! These furry engineers returned to London in 2023 after a long vacation. On October 11, a family of wild beavers from Scotland moved into their new home in Ealing. It had been about 400 years since beavers last lived in the city. Now, these busy builders are ready to create dams, help the environment, and make a big splash in London's waterways!

story: Climbers on Mount Everest made a chilling discovery. They found what might be the remains of Andrew 'Sandy' Irvine, a mountaineer who vanished in 1924. The team spotted a foot, shoe, and labeled sock high on the icy slopes. Irvine disappeared with his climbing partner George Mallory a century ago. Their fate has puzzled explorers for years. This October 11 find in 2024 could help solve one of mountaineering's greatest mysteries.

title: Mavericks Stampede into NBA History
story: Swish! The Dallas Mavericks burst onto the basketball scene with a bang. In their very first NBA game on October 11, 1980, they outscored their Texas rivals, the San Antonio Spurs. The Mavericks galloped to victory, 103-92, in front of a roaring crowd at Reunion Arena. It was a perfect start for the new team, showing they had the skills to compete with the best in the league.
activity_question: Who did the Dallas Mavericks defeat in their first NBA game?
follow_up_question: What was the name of the arena where the Mavericks played their first game?
